subject: FW: Brillo decoration
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: Daniel Estes [mailto:destes@zeffdesign.com] 
Sent: Tuesday, December 04, 2007 5:23 PM
To: kellens@earthlink.net
Cc: Lesley Groff; Rich Kahn; daschoettle@yahoo.com; Helena Maybank
Subject: Brillo decoration



Sarah,

Attached please find a revised decoration schedule for the house on
Brillo Way.  The additions here are the pricing for all of the custom
items.  These include the kitchen banquette, the suspended bench in the
Lake Room, the framing of the painted mirrors and all of the window
treatments.  Please contact me immediately if you wish to proceed with
any of these items.  I will be traveling the next few days but checking
my e-mail regularly.  Thank-you.

 

Daniel Estes

destes@zeffdesign.com <mailto:destes@zeffdesign.com> 

 

zeffdesign

 

515 West 20th St, 4W

New York,  NY  10011

 

P. 212.580.7090 x206

F. 212.580.7181

www.zeffdesign.com

Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

From: Daniel Estes [mailto:destes@zeffdesign.com]
Sent: Tuesday, December 04, 2007 5:23 PM
To: kellens@earthlink.net
Cc: Lesley Groff; Rich Kahn; daschoettle@yahoo.com; Helena Maybank
Subject: Brillo decoration

Sarah,

Attached please find a revised decoration schedule for the house on Brillo Way.  The additions here are the pricing for all of the custom items.  These include the kitchen banquette, the suspended bench in the Lake Room, the framing of the painted mirrors and all of the window treatments.  Please contact me immediately if you wish to proceed with any of these items.  I will be traveling the next few days but checking my e-mail regularly.  Thank-you.
